purpose: Preparation of ligands for AutoDock Vina

common_protocol.coordinate_source: Final frozen STEP 3 omegaB97X-D3/def2-SVP/CPCM(water) XYZ geometry
common_protocol.topology_source: Audited RDKit MOL topology with identical atom order and validated stereochemical identity
common_protocol.coordinate_transfer: Atom-for-atom; no distance-based bond perception; no geometry optimization
common_protocol.protonation_state: Validated neutral state; total formal charge 0
common_protocol.hydrogens: Explicit QM hydrogens supplied; standard Meeko nonpolar-H merging used for PDBQT
common_protocol.torsions: Default Meeko torsions plus motif-based rigidification of conjugated exocyclic bonds misclassified as rotatable

compound_08.rule: Rigidify conjugated hydrazone N-N bond in C=N-NH-C(=S)-NH2.

compound_09.rule: Rigidify conjugated hydrazone N-N bond in C=N-NH-C(=S)-NH2.

compound_11.rule: Rigidify conjugated exocyclic NH2-thiadiazole C-N bond; retain ring-N-scaffold sigma rotor.

step8b_audit_ligand_topology_mapping.py.role: Read-only audit of final XYZ atom order versus audited MOL/SDF topology.

step8b_map_meeko_rotors.py.role: Read-only mapping of default Meeko branches to original ligand bonds.

step8b_validate_proposed_torsion_rules.p.role: Read-only validation that chemistry-aware SMARTS rules remove only intended conjugated rotors.

step8_prepare_final_qm_ligands.py.role: Canonical dry-run/apply preparation of final-QM SDF and ligand PDBQT files.

step8_finalize_ligand_documentation.py.role: Finalization of script provenance and STEP 8 checksum manifest.
